title: Satellite Imagery Analysis with Deep Learning
author: Orbit Williams
Remote Sensing Engineer
description: Detect objects in satellite imagery—but adversarial patterns fool models
content:
Deep learning enables automated analysis of global satellite imagery at scale.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Satellite Blindness (2038)](/docs/articles/satellite-blindness-2038)
